sentences.target: Ich höre einen Einbrecher im Keller.

translations.de: Ich höre einen Einbrecher im Keller.
translations.en: I hear a burglar in the basement.
translations.es: Escucho a un ladrón en el sótano.
translations.zh-Hans: 我听到地下室里有小偷。
translations.vi: Tôi nghe thấy có kẻ trộm dưới tầng hầm.
translations.nl: Ik hoor een inbreker in de kelder.
translations.hi: मुझे तहखाने में चोर की आहट सुनाई दे रही है.
translations.nb: Jeg hører en innbruddstyv i kjelleren.
translations.id: Aku mendengar ada pencuri di ruang bawah tanah.
translations.sv: Jag hör en inbrottstjuv i källaren.
translations.da: Jeg hører en indbrudstyv i kælderen.
translations.ja: 地下室から泥棒の物音が聞こえる。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, 1st person singular present; main predicate, takes the direct object 'einen Einbrecher' and the locative PP 'im Keller'.
Indefinite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Einbrecher', marking the direct object.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the object noun phrase governed by 'höre'.
Preposition (contracted form of 'in dem'); introduces a dative prepositional phrase indicating location.
Common noun, masculine singular dative; object of the preposition 'im', expressing location.

sentences.target: Der Einbrecher rennt über den Hof.

translations.de: Der Einbrecher rennt über den Hof.
translations.en: The burglar runs across the yard.
translations.es: El ladrón corre por el patio.
translations.fr: Le cambrioleur court à travers la cour.
translations.it: Il ladro corre attraverso il cortile.
translations.vi: Tên trộm chạy băng qua sân.
translations.nl: De inbreker rent over het erf.
translations.hi: चोर आँगन के पार दौड़ रहा है.
translations.el: Ο διαρρήκτης τρέχει μέσα στην αυλή.
translations.ja: 泥棒が庭を横切って走っている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determiner of the subject noun 'Einbrecher'.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular present; intransitive main predicate, modified by the directional PP 'über den Hof'.
Preposition selecting accusative in directional use; heads the PP indicating path.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Hof' within the PP.
Common noun, masculine singular accusative; object of the preposition 'über', indicating the area traversed.

sentences.target: Ich erkenne den Einbrecher auf dem Foto.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ɛʁˈkɛnə deːn ˈaɪ̯nˌbʁɛçɐ aʊ̯f deːm ˈfoːto/

translations.de: Ich erkenne den Einbrecher auf dem Foto.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ɛʁˈkɛnə deːn ˈaɪ̯nˌbʁɛçɐ aʊ̯f deːm ˈfoːto/
translations.en: I recognize the burglar in the photo.
translations.es: Reconozco al ladrón en la foto.
translations.fr: Je reconnais le cambrioleur sur la photo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在照片里认出了那个小偷。
translations.yue: 我喺相入面認得嗰個賊。
translations.vi: Tôi nhận ra kẻ trộm trong bức ảnh.
translations.nl: Ik herken de inbreker op de foto.
translations.hi: मैं फोटो में उस चोर को पहचानता हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg kjenner igjen innbruddstyven på bildet.
translations.id: Aku mengenali pencuri itu di foto.
translations.sv: Jag känner igen inbrottstjuven på bilden.
translations.ro: Îl recunosc pe hoț în poză.
translations.ja: 写真でその泥棒がわかる。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, 1st person singular present; transitive main predicate taking 'den Einbrecher' as direct object and the PP 'auf dem Foto' as context.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Einbrecher' marking the direct object.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the accusative object noun phrase.
Preposition; with dative in static/location use; heads the PP indicating where the recognition occurs.
Definite article, dative neuter singular; determiner of 'Foto' within the PP.
Common noun, neuter singular dative; object of the preposition 'auf', indicating the medium.

sentences.target: Die Polizei sucht den Einbrecher seit gestern.
sentences.reading: /diː pɔliˈtsaɪ̯ zuːxt deːn ˈaɪ̯nˌbʁɛçɐ zaɪ̯t ˈɡɛstɐn/

translations.de: Die Polizei sucht den Einbrecher seit gestern.
translations.ipa: /diː pɔliˈtsaɪ̯ zuːxt deːn ˈaɪ̯nˌbʁɛçɐ zaɪ̯t ˈɡɛstɐn/
translations.en: The police have been looking for the burglar since yesterday.
translations.es: La policía busca al ladrón desde ayer.
translations.fr: La police cherche le cambrioleur depuis hier.
translations.it: La polizia cerca il ladro da ieri.
translations.ko: 경찰은 어제부터 그 도둑을 찾고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 警察从昨天开始一直在找那个小偷。
translations.yue: 警察由尋日開始一直搵嗰個賊。
translations.ru: Полиция разыскивает вора со вчерашнего дня.
translations.pt: A polícia está procurando o ladrão desde ontem.
translations.he: המשטרה מחפשת את הפורץ מאז אתמול.
translations.vi: Cảnh sát đang truy tìm kẻ trộm từ hôm qua đến nay.
translations.ar: الشرطة تبحث عن اللص منذ أمس.
translations.nl: De politie is sinds gisteren op zoek naar de inbreker.
translations.hu: A rendőrség tegnap óta keresi a betörőt.
translations.hi: पुलिस कल से उस चोर को ढूंढ रही है.
translations.el: Η αστυνομία ψάχνει τον διαρρήκτη από χθες.
translations.nb: Politiet har lett etter innbruddstyven siden i går.
translations.id: Polisi sudah mencari pencuri itu sejak kemarin.
translations.sv: Polisen har letat efter inbrottstjuven sedan i går.
translations.ro: Poliția îl caută pe hoț de ieri.
translations.da: Politiet har ledt efter indbrudstyven siden i går.
translations.ja: 警察はきのうからその泥棒を捜している。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular; determiner of 'Polizei', the subject noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular present; transitive main predicate, selecting the direct object 'den Einbrecher' and modified by the temporal expression 'seit gestern'.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Einbrecher', marking the direct object.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the accusative object noun phrase.
Preposition expressing a temporal starting point; combines with the adverb 'gestern' to form a temporal modifier.
Temporal adverb; complement of 'seit', yielding a temporal phrase modifying the verb.
